user_story: As a System admin, I want to set the country and date format, so that dates display consistently across the application
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Localization Settings screen; When I select a Country and Date format and click Save; Then dates are displayed in the chosen format

user_story: As a System admin, I want to configure the currency symbol and format, so that monetary values show correctly in numbers and words
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Localization Settings screen; When I select the Country/Currency symbol and save; Then amounts render with the correct currency format

user_story: As a System admin, I want to set the distance unit, so that travel and location distances use the correct measurement
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Localization Settings screen; When I select a Distance unit and save; Then distances are shown in that unit

user_story: As a System admin, I want to set the pin code format, so that address pin codes are validated and displayed consistently
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Localization Settings screen; When I configure the Pin Code format and save; Then pin codes follow the defined format

user_story: As a System admin, I want to save and continue to the next setup step, so that I can complete localization within the configuration flow
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set localization values; When I click Save & Next; Then the settings are saved and the next screen opens
